Build a compiled likelihood context from a model

Source: R/likelihood_param_interface.R
make_context.Rd

A context stores compiled model/runtime state only. Behavioral data are prepared separately with `prepare_data()` and supplied to `log_likelihood()`.

Usage

make_context(structure, prep = NULL)

Arguments

structure

Finalized model structure.

prep

Optional preprocessed model bundle.

Value

An `accumulatr_context` object.

Examples

spec <- race_spec()
spec <- add_accumulator(spec, "A", "lognormal")
spec <- add_outcome(spec, "A_win", "A")
structure <- finalize_model(spec)
make_context(structure)
#> $cpp
#> $cpp$prep
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$id
#> [1] "A"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$dist
#> [1] "lognormal"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$onset
#> [1] 0
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$onset_spec
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$onset_spec$kind
#> [1] "absolute"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$onset_spec$value
#> [1] 0
#> 
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$q
#> [1] 0
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$params
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$params$t0
#> [1] 0
#> 
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$components
#> character(0)
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$shared_trigger_id
#> NULL
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$accumulators$A$shared_trigger_q
#> NULL
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$pools
#> named list()
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$outcomes
#> $cpp$prep$outcomes$A_win
#> $cpp$prep$outcomes$A_win$label
#> [1] "A_win"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$outcomes$A_win$expr
#> $cpp$prep$outcomes$A_win$expr$kind
#> [1] "event"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$outcomes$A_win$expr$source
#> [1] "A"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$outcomes$A_win$expr$k
#> NULL
#> 
#> attr(,".lik_id")
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$outcomes$A_win$options
#> list()
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$components
#> $cpp$prep$components$ids
#> [1] "__default__"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$components$weights
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$components$attrs
#> $cpp$prep$components$attrs$`__default__`
#> $cpp$prep$components$attrs$`__default__`$weight_param
#> NULL
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$components$has_weight_param
#> [1] FALSE
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$components$mode
#> [1] "fixed"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$components$reference
#> [1] "__default__"
#> 
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$observation
#> $cpp$prep$observation$mode
#> [1] "top_k"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$observation$n_outcomes
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$observation$global_n_outcomes
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$observation$component_n_outcomes
#> named list()
#> 
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$shared_triggers
#> list()
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$onset_specs
#> $cpp$prep$onset_specs$A
#> $cpp$prep$onset_specs$A$kind
#> [1] "absolute"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$onset_specs$A$value
#> [1] 0
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$onset_dependencies
#> $cpp$prep$onset_dependencies$A
#> character(0)
#> 
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$onset_sources
#> named list()

#> $cpp$prep$onset_topology
#> [1] "A"
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$onset_has_dependencies
#> [1] FALSE
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$.id_index
#> A_win     A 
#>     1     2 
#> 
#> $cpp$prep$.label_cache
#> <environment: 0x107015c10>

#> [1] TRUE
